hero.title: Software, AI & cloud, built to scale with you.
hero.subtitle: A small, senior team that builds big. W2C Tech delivers custom software, intelligent AI systems and cloud — for ambitious companies across the EU, US and India. Founded 2020.

capabilities.heading: One partner, the whole stack.
capabilities.subtitle: We solve problems end-to-end — strategy, engineering, AI and the people to run it. No hand-offs, no gaps.

items.d: Custom product engineering — SaaS platforms, web apps, internal tools and APIs, built to last and built to scale.
LLM features, ML models, intelligent automation and AI woven into the software you already run.
The “to Cloud” in Web to Cloud — migrations, infrastructure, CI/CD and platforms that stay up.
Reskilled, vetted engineers and full squads on transparent per-hour billing — through our trusted vendor network.

approach.heading: From idea to production, then beyond.
approach.subtitle: Every engagement runs on the same belief: build scalable systems, embed AI where it earns its keep, and stay long enough to see them grow.
approach.aiTag: AI built into every layer — not bolted on after.
steps: We learn your domain, map the problem and design an architecture that won't need rebuilding next year.
Senior engineers ship in tight loops — software, AI models and cloud infrastructure, in production fast.
We harden, automate and grow the system — and the team — as your traffic and ambitions climb.

cases.heading: Trusted by teams that ship.
cases.subtitle: From EU marketplaces to US analytics — long-term partnerships, not one-off projects.

aboutTeaser.heading: A small team that builds big systems.
aboutTeaser.subtitle: We're a focused, senior team — small enough to care, sharp enough to build big. We help clients use the web, cloud and AI to their full potential, with people you can count on.
aboutTeaser.mission: To help clients harness the internet and AI through affordable, effective, custom software.
aboutTeaser.vision: To be a global leader in scalable, intelligent software that strengthens our clients' businesses.

founders.quote: We started small to build big — scalable systems, lasting partnerships, and AI that earns its place.

whyUs.heading: The right partner, at an honest price.
whyUs.subtitle: We have the expertise to offer impartial advice and services — and we genuinely want your company to reach its potential.
points: We listen first, then choose the solution that actually fits — not the one that bills the most.
We treat it as our own
A sincere stake in your outcome. Your roadmap, uptime and growth become ours too.
Senior expertise at reasonable rates, with flexible engagement and staffing models.
Architecture and AI decisions made for where you're going, not just where you are.

cta.heading: Let's build something that scales with you.
cta.subtitle: Tell us where you want to go. We'll bring the engineers, the AI, and the cloud to get you there.

footer.desc: Web to Cloud. We build scalable software, intelligent AI systems, and the teams to run them — for partners across the EU, US and India.

services.title: Everything from web to cloud — and the AI in between.
services.subtitle: Six capabilities, one accountable partner. Mix and match, or hand us the whole thing. Either way, you get senior people who own the outcome.
services.engagementHeading: Work with us the way that fits.

about.title: A software team that grows businesses, not just code.
about.subtitle: A small, senior team that builds big. Since 2020 we have delivered software, AI and cloud systems for partners across the EU, US and India.
about.storyHeading: From Web to Cloud — and now to AI.
about.story1: W2C — Web to Cloud — started with a simple idea: help businesses use the internet to its full potential. Since 2020, that mission has grown to run through cloud and AI too.
about.story2: Today we ship software, intelligent AI systems and the cloud platforms that run them — and when teams need more hands, we provide vetted engineers through our trusted vendor network.
about.leadershipHeading: The people who keep us pointed forward.
about.valuesHeading: How we show up, every project.
about.valuesTag: Trusted vendor tie-ups for staffing at any scale.
about.missionText: To help our clients use the internet and AI to their full potential — through affordable, effective, custom design, software and marketing solutions.
about.vision: A global leader in scalable software.
about.visionText: To become a global leader in unique, intelligent web and cloud solutions that improve our clients productivity and business strength.

careers.title: Build software that matters — with people who have got your back.
careers.subtitle: We are a small, senior team shipping for clients worldwide. If you like ownership, scale and a bit of AI, you will feel at home.
careers.rolesNote: Don't see your exact role? We are always talking to good engineers — send us a note anyway.

contact.title: Let's talk about what we can build together.
contact.subtitle: Tell us where you want to go. We will bring the engineers, the AI and the cloud to help you get there — usually with a reply inside one business day.
contact.name: Your name
contact.projectPlaceholder: A few lines on what you are building and where you would like help…
contact.thanksText: We will review your note and get back to you within one business day.
contact.directText: Prefer email? Reach us directly and we will route you to the right person.
